response.justification: Bogdan brings solid engineering breadth spanning roughly 20 years and has recently pivoted into AI-adjacent infrastructure work (MCP generators, agentic workflows), but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with deep, recognized expertise in AI — demonstrated through built products, thought leadership, and executive-level advisory. His AI experience is largely confined to his current role (April 2025–present), with no prior track record of shipping AI-powered platforms at scale, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of the strategic customer-facing or cross-industry influencing responsibilities the position requires.
strengths: ~20 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Genuine entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective (founded, open-sourced, and deployed to real users) and early-stage startup experience (WatchUp, Apon)
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling in current role, showing willingness and capability to move into the AI domain
concerns: AI expertise is extremely recent (April 2025) and shallow relative to the requirement for recognized AI thought leadership and demonstrated AI-powered product or platform delivery at scale
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; role strongly prefers advanced AI credentials as a signal of depth in the space
No evidence of director-level strategic advisory, external thought leadership, or executive/partner-facing influence — the role centers on these responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Absence of advanced AI degree or recognized AI credentials
